I have a complete picture now. Let me summarize my review.

**Verification results:**
- Both required constants extracted correctly with doc comments, values unchanged (200, 500).
- No shared constants file; each constant lives in its using module.
- All setTimeout calls now reference the named constants (grep confirms no raw literals).
- `npm test`: 382 passed, 3 skipped — all timing tests pass.
- `tsc` compiled cleanly (the build only failed at the post-tsc `copy-assets.mjs` step due to a missing bootstrap-icons font file in node_modules — an environment issue, unrelated to this change).

**One concern:** The diff includes a modification to `src/app/toolbar-handlers.test.ts` that was NOT part of the task. The task explicitly said "Only extract them to named constants with documenting comments." A new test pinning the exact 200ms debounce boundary was added — this is scope expansion beyond the stated refactor.
